# Okyo Screen Batch 01

This folder contains the first Okyo screen image batch.

## Source Brief

Use `docs/OKYO_SCREEN_IMAGE_PROMPT.md` as the source of truth for all generated screen images.

## Generated Files

These six standalone 9:16 PNGs were generated at 1080x1920:

1. `01-splash-screen.png` - Splash Screen
2. `02-onboarding-welcome.png` - Onboarding Welcome
3. `06-scan-home-screen.png` - Scan Home Screen
4. `09-scan-result-screen.png` - Scan Result Screen
5. `10-recipe-overview-screen.png` - Recipe Overview Screen
6. `14-viral-share-card-export.png` - Viral Share Card Export

Each image is its own separate 9:16 asset. This batch does not use collages or phone mockup frames.

# Okyo Screen Image Batch 01

This folder contains the first generated Okyo screen batch based on `docs/OKYO_SCREEN_IMAGE_PROMPT.md`.

Each asset is a separate 9:16 raster PNG at `1080x1920` pixels. The batch intentionally includes only the six requested screens, not a collage.

## Generated screens

- `01-splash-screen.png` — 01 Splash Screen
- `02-onboarding-welcome.png` — 02 Onboarding Welcome
- `06-scan-home-screen.png` — 06 Scan Home Screen
- `09-scan-result-screen.png` — 09 Scan Result Screen
- `10-recipe-overview-screen.png` — 10 Recipe Overview Screen
- `14-viral-share-card-export.png` — 14 Viral Share Card Export
